# Step 7: GO 富集

## 7.1 GO ORA 主图与扩展图

```{r}
ensure_module_result_layout("07_go")

de_result <- restore_main_de_result(required = TRUE)
geneList_symbol_fc <- build_gene_foldchange_symbol(de_result)

if (!file.exists(cache_06_tables_path)) {
  stop("缺少 06 表格缓存: ", cache_06_tables_path, "。请先运行模块 06。")
}

enrichment_tables <- readRDS(cache_06_tables_path)
if (!is.list(enrichment_tables)) {
  stop("06 表格缓存格式错误（应为 list）: ", cache_06_tables_path)
}

go_directional_df <- enrichment_tables[["go_directional_df"]] %||% data.frame()

subset_go_df <- function(direction_value, source_value) {
  if (nrow(go_directional_df) == 0) {
    return(data.frame())
  }
  go_directional_df %>%
    filter(direction == direction_value, source == source_value)
}

go_ora_sets <- list(
  all = list(
    BP = subset_go_df("all", "BP"),
    MF = subset_go_df("all", "MF"),
    CC = subset_go_df("all", "CC"),
    ALL = subset_go_df("all", "ALL")
  ),
  up = list(
    BP = subset_go_df("up", "BP"),
    MF = subset_go_df("up", "MF"),
    CC = subset_go_df("up", "CC"),
    ALL = subset_go_df("up", "ALL")
  ),
  down = list(
    BP = subset_go_df("down", "BP"),
    MF = subset_go_df("down", "MF"),
    CC = subset_go_df("down", "CC"),
    ALL = subset_go_df("down", "ALL")
  )
)

has_enrichment_objects <- FALSE
if (file.exists(cache_06_objects_path)) {
  enrichment_objects <- readRDS(cache_06_objects_path)
  if (is.list(enrichment_objects) && !is.null(enrichment_objects[["go_ora_sets"]])) {
    go_ora_sets <- enrichment_objects[["go_ora_sets"]]
    has_enrichment_objects <- TRUE
  }
}
if (!has_enrichment_objects) {
  message("[07_go] 未检测到 06 对象缓存，cnet/tree 等对象型图将显式跳过；表格型输出继续生成。")
}

go_family_paths <- function(out_dir, prefix) {
  list(
    bar = file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_barplot.pdf")),
    dot = file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_dotplot.pdf")),
    cnet = file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_cnetplot.pdf")),
    tree = file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_Treeplot.pdf")),
    chord = file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_Chord.pdf")),
    upset = file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_UpSet.pdf")),
    cluster = file.path(out_dir, paste0(prefix, "_Cluster.pdf"))
  )
}

for (one_direction in names(go_ora_sets)) {
  one_table_dir <- step6_table_dir(one_direction)
  one_plot_dir <- step6_plot_dir(one_direction)
  one_label <- direction_label(one_direction)
  one_go_set <- go_ora_sets[[one_direction]]

  write_csv_safe(make_result_df(one_go_set$BP), file.path(one_table_dir, "7_1_GO_BP_enrichment_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safe(make_result_df(one_go_set$MF), file.path(one_table_dir, "7_2_GO_MF_enrichment_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safe(make_result_df(one_go_set$CC), file.path(one_table_dir, "7_3_GO_CC_enrichment_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write_csv_safe(make_result_df(one_go_set$ALL), file.path(one_table_dir, "7_4_GO_ALL_enrichment_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

  save_go_family(one_go_set$BP, go_family_paths(one_plot_dir, "7_1_GO_BP"), paste("GO BP", one_label), "BP")
  save_go_family(one_go_set$MF, go_family_paths(one_plot_dir, "7_2_GO_MF"), paste("GO MF", one_label), "MF")
  save_go_family(one_go_set$CC, go_family_paths(one_plot_dir, "7_3_GO_CC"), paste("GO CC", one_label), "CC")
  save_go_all_family(one_go_set$ALL, one_plot_dir, paste("GO ORA", one_label))
}

write_csv_safe(go_directional_df, file.path(step6_table_dir("all"), "7_0_GO_directional_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
if (nrow(go_directional_df) > 0) {
  save_directional_ora_plot(
    go_directional_df %>% filter(source == "ALL"),
    file.path(step6_plot_dir("all"), "7_0_GO_directional_dotplot.pdf"),
    "GO ORA by direction"
  )
}
```
